scripts.packages:build: bun run --filter '@boina/contracts' build && bun run --filter '@boina/engine' build && bun run --filter '@radar/keyword-pipeline' build
scripts.packages:pack:dry-run: bun run packages:build && bun run packages:prepare-publish && npm pack packages/contracts/dist --dry-run && npm pack packages/engine/dist --dry-run && npm pack packages/keyword-pipeline/dist --dry-run
